---
title: "Making Quarto OERs Reusable"
format: html

previous:
  href: "Modular-reproducibility.html"
  text: "Reproducibility"

next:
  href: "Modular-Referencing.html"
  text: "Referencing"
---

Best practice includes:

-   modular design using child documents;

-   separating long code into chunks of script;

-   maintaining a clear folder structure;

-   providing editable image assets;

-   avoiding vendor lock-in by using open tools.

[![](images/clipboard-2765196364.png){fig-alt="Go to next page: Modular-Referencing.html" fig-align="center" width="50"}](/Modular%20OERs/Modular-Referencing.html)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: nav-footer
```{=html}
<a href="{{< meta previous.href >}}" aria-label="Go to previous page: {{< meta previous.text >}}">
  <span aria-hidden="true">«</span> {{< meta previous.text >}}
</a>

<a href="{{< meta next.href >}}" aria-label="Go to next page: {{< meta next.text >}}">
  {{< meta next.text >}} <span aria-hidden="true">»</span>
</a>
```
:::
